original_image_tags: A handwritten letter on lined blue-ruled paper, written in blue ink. The paper shows some minor smudges and age spots. There are stamped and handwritten notations at the bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned handwritten letter on lined paper, dated 3/8/68 and 3/19/68, with red stamped markings reading “ENCLOSURE” and “CORRESPONDENCE” and a partial blue FBI circular stamp at the lower left.*
